name: OER Cleanup Sites
note: The flagship OER dataset and the machine-readable backing of the SPEED map. Updated DAILY and carries a full BBL/BIN geography spine (Borough, Community Board, Council District, Census Tract, NTA, coordinates). The one strong, live OER data surface.

name: Historic Land Use Data
note: Digitized historic (Sanborn-style) land-use records keyed to BBL, flagging past environmental concerns (former gas stations, dry cleaners, etc.). Feeds due-diligence on whether a parcel is likely contaminated. Historical snapshot, not updated.

name: NYC Clean Soil Bank Generating and Receiving Sites
note: Sites that generate and receive clean soil under OER's Clean Soil Bank (850,000+ tons recycled). Tabular twin of the map asset hywf-9b6t.

name: Shapefiles of BOA and Community Brownfield Planning Areas
note: Map asset — parent geospatial layer for OER's Brownfield Opportunity Area (BOA) and community brownfield planning areas.

name: NYC Clean Soil Bank Generating and Receiving Sites
note: Map asset — Clean Soil Bank generating/receiving sites (geospatial view of b4dv-8mq4).

name: BOA and Community Brownfield Planning Areas - Designated BOAs
note: State-designated Brownfield Opportunity Areas (BOAs). Carries links to the NYS program and to OER's EPIC portal (epic_link).

name: Shapefiles of BOA and Community Brownfield Planning Areas - EPA Area Wide Planning Areas
note: EPA Area-Wide Planning brownfield areas within the BOA/community planning suite.

name: Shapefiles of BOA and Community Brownfield Planning Areas - OER Community Grant Projects
note: OER community grant project areas (BIG / community-organization grants) as a geospatial layer.

name: BOA and Community Brownfield Planning Areas - BOA Studies
note: Brownfield Opportunity Area study boundaries within the BOA suite.

name: Shapefiles of BOA and Community Brownfield Planning Areas - OER Existing Conditions Studies
note: OER Existing Conditions Studies (ECS) areas within the BOA suite; carries an ecs_link to the study document.

name: E-Designations
note: RELATED, NOT OER-OWNED. The authoritative (E)-designation inventory is published under the DEPARTMENT OF CITY PLANNING (DCP) label, updated Monthly. OER administers RESOLVING the (E) requirement but does not publish the inventory. Companion assets: 'E Designations: shapefile' (mzjp-98aw, DCP) and a second 'E-Designations' table (jsrs-ggnx, DCP).

name: E Designations: shapefile
note: RELATED, NOT OER-OWNED. Geospatial (E)-designation layer, published by DCP. Most-viewed E-designation asset citywide (8,989 views), which underscores that the demand sits on a surface OER does not own.
